caption: The video features a man with a beard, wearing a light gray shirt, seated and speaking to the camera. He appears to be part of a news segment or interview, as indicated by the "People's Dispatch" logo in the top left corner and the text "Daily Round-Up" repeated in the background. To his right, there is an inset image of Fatou Bensouda, identified as the International Criminal Court's chief prosecutor. The man seems to be discussing or commenting on a topic related to Fatou Bensouda, possibly her role or recent actions. His expression and body language suggest he is engaged in delivering information or analysis. The overall setting suggests a professional and informative tone, likely aimed at providing viewers with updates or insights on current events.
